svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.div: No partial payments v1 — charges settle in full. Late fees are SEPARATE Charge rows generated by the scheduled run from per-society config rules; the original charge is never mutated. Client never marks a charge paid.

div.div: A CronJob (EventBridge + Lambda) generates Charges from active schedules, idempotent per period key. Amending/deactivating a schedule leaves already-generated charges untouched. Due-date reminder pushes follow the run.
